steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined sentence, which states Ellis and Lind's conclusion about ocean acidification.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘It lists several traits of Scyliorhinus canicula discovered by Ellis and Lind while conducting their 2014 study.’: no traits are listed in the sentence. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘It emphasizes a detail about where Ellis and Lind conducted their 2014 study.’: location is never mentioned. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘It presents a criticism of the results reported by Ellis and Lind in their 2014 study.’: the limitation is methodological, not a criticism of the conclusion itself; Porter raises that later. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘It states the conclusion reached by Ellis and Lind in their 2014 study.’: the sentence opens by stating their published conclusion. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
